evidence_summary: Alnylam Pharmaceuticals Inc. explicitly lists Alnylam Belgium BVBA (also referred to as Alnylam Belgium SPRL/BVBA or Alnylam Belgium SRL) as a 100% owned subsidiary in its SEC filings (Exhibit 21.1). The Belgian entity was founded in September 2018 to serve as a strategic hub for the parent company's international operations and clinical research in the BENELUX region.
